entry.title: Queue Error: delivery completed indicator cannot be set for 00010 item

entry.title: Customer UUID
entry.content:
Hello,

 

When testing web-service interface 'ManageCustomerIn' (I want to change customer master data) getting this error message: The value ? is not a valid UUID in the format "hhhhhhhh-hhhh-hhhh-hhhh-hhhhhhhhhhhh"

I need to replace in query value ? with UUID. But where can I get it from?

entry.title: Condition Contract Sample Request Payload For API
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am working on API_CONDITION_CONTRACT - SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

I am looking for a sample request payload, which will contract Business Volume Selection Criteria, Settlement Calendar and Rebate Percentage.

Thanks,

Arindam Sur

entry.title: Re: 1h2025 - Include Inactive Employees in the search- ac...
entry.content:
Hi Kris, 

If I want to find performance forms for leavers, the way I do it is via 'Detailed Document Search'

  • Go to the Reporting module
  • Click on Switch to Classic View
  • Classic Reporting > Detailed Document Search
  • In the "Employee Document Folder Search" section, select the Completed Folder, and click Find User... to search for the user, insuring that All Users is selected under More Options (so that it includes leavers)

A bit cluncky, but it works!

Thanks, 
Jack

entry.title: "Error while parsing an XML stream" while trying to create customer for Business partner
entry.content:
Screenshot: Error in Preview mode of SAP Build while trying to create Business partner & customers.

I tried to create Business partner and business partner role using "Create Record" by applying the following formula.

SET_KEY(SET_KEY(data.A_BusinessPartner1,"to_BusinessPartnerAddress", [ {BusinessPartner: params.BPID, AddressID: params.AddressID, HouseNumber: data.A_BusinessPartnerAddress1.HouseNumber, StreetName: data.A_BusinessPartnerAddress1.StreetName, CityName: data.A_BusinessPartnerAddress1.CityName, Country: data.A_BusinessPartnerAddress1.Country, PostalCode: data.A_BusinessPartnerAddress1.PostalCode} ] ), "to_BusinessPartnerRole", [ {BusinessPartnerRole: "FLCU00"}, {BusinessPartnerRole: "FLCU01"} ] )

Then, I have put an ALERT which gives me the Business Partner created success message.

Then, in my logic, I have used another "Create Record" to create customer for this Business Partner using the following formula.

SET_KEY({BusinessPartner: pageVars.BusinessPartnerNumber},"to_Customer", [{Customer: "", CustomerAccountGroup: "ZBLD"}])

Over here, I am trying to use the same Business Partner number which got generated from the previous CREATE RECORD and had saved it into a page variable. This create record fails and triggers a toast giving me the above screenshot error.

entry.content: Did you get any solution to this issue?

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch in Mannheim (1 of 2) - Let's chat Joule and all things SAP...
entry.content:
It's time to meetup in Mannheim!!!  While our SAP developer event is internal only, we are going to gather together with a relaxed Monday evening get-together and all are welcome! 🎊

📆When?
🕔 starting from 18:30 (6:30pm) on Monday, June 30

📍Where?
Augusta Restaurant Mannheim Germany 

🌤️ What to expect:
- A wonderful place for drinks or food
- chance to network and connect for those attending the SAP internal developer event and anyone else in the SAP ecosystem looking to drop in and say hi
- à la carte food & drinks 🍔🍷 (pay your own way)

🎟️ Who’s invited?
Everyone! Whether you’re an SAP employee attending the internal event or an SAP enthusiast - come hang out! 💬👋

Please hit the YES button so we know how many to expect.  See you soon!!!

entry.title: Re: Recruiting APIs
entry.content:
Please see my response below:

  • The posting link is not available in the API. This is a current limitation. Could you please share the use case?

  • You should be able to filter based on the picklist fields. If it’s a custom field, ensure it is reportable; otherwise, it won’t be filterable.

  • You should be able to view the picklist field values. Are they not available in the API dictionary?

Thanks,

Sanjeet

entry.title: SAP Developer News June 26th, 2025
entry.content:
DESCRIPTION 

PODCAST: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2025/06/26/sap-developer-news-june-26th-2025/ 

TechEd Registration is Live 

  • TechEd Registration Page: https://www.sap.com/events/teched.html 

 

SAP CodeTalk with Matt Harding 

  • SAP CodeTalk with Matt Harding - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZLWMBdknrIY 
  • SAP CodeTalk playlist - https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQB4SrWDL_VpeZnDJ1pcLRpA&si=1AbGH_J9j2b5dYmr 

 

What’s New in SAP HANA Cloud 2025/Q2 

  • What’s New in SAP HANA Cloud – June 2025: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/what-s-new-in-sap-hana-cloud-june-2025/ba-p/14135545 
  • New Machine Learning and AI features in SAP HANA Cloud 2025 Q2: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/new-machine-learning-and-ai-features-in-sap-hana-cloud-2025-q2/ba-p/14136079 
  • Calculation View Features of 2025 QRC2: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/calculation-view-features-of-2025-qrc2/ba-p/14130552 

 

InnerSource Summit 2025 CfP open until 15 July 

  • CfP form https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfWKkRDWIYN8eTOMlxONZp23-_i9nnAfqSJm26QCdzS5NtO9w/viewform  
  • InnerSource Summit 2025 details https://innersourcecommons.org/events/isc-2025/ 

 

CodeJam Roadshows 

  • Singapore – ABAP Cloud https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/sap-codejam-abap-sap-btp-abap-environment-amp-rap-singapore/ev-p/14112313 
  • Singapore – SAP GenAI - https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-generative-ai-hub-on-sap-ai-core-singapore/ev-p/14112295 
  • Kuala Lumpur – SAP Build - https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/sap-build-create-apps-processes-and-sites-without-code-kuala-lumpur/ev-p/14112261 
  • Bangkok – SAP GenAI - https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-generative-ai-hub-on-sap-ai-core-bangkok-thailand/ev-p/14112276 
  • SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2025 - Latin America edition 🇧🇷🇵🇪🇲🇽🇨🇴(July 25th - Aug 12th 2024): https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/sap-codejam-roadshow-2025-latin-america-edition-july-25th-aug-12th-2025/ba-p/14093930 

 

 CHAPTER TITLES  

0:00 Intro 

0:10 TechEd Registration Is Live 

1:16 CodeTalk with Matt Harding 

2:04 What’s New in SAP HANA Cloud 2025/Q2 SAP 

4:02 InnerSource Summit 2025 CfP open until 15 July 

4:48 Update from the US AI CodeJam Roadshow 

 

TRANSCRIPTION

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for June the 26th, 2025.  

[Rich & Thomas] Hey, everybody. SAP TechEd registration is live. That's right. So if you want to get registered early and get a discount, make sure you get out there for the early nerd. Early nerd. Early nerd discount and register today. What you can expect at TechEd this year, great things like the Community Clubhouse. We want to make it bigger and better than ever. We want to bring back that community feel that we had at TechEds of years past. We'll have hands-on sessions. We'll have lectures, community talks, strategy talks, all kinds of information for you guys to take home and use to make yourselves better as developers and architects. Yeah, and of course, if you can't make it to Berlin for the big in-person TechEd, selective sessions will be streamed online on the virtual platform as well. And we'll have TechEd on tour. We've already announced some of the locations and dates with more coming soon as well. So hopefully, no matter where you are in the world, we're going to bring you some form of TechEd this year. And we look forward to seeing all of you there.  

[Mamikee] Hi, everyone. We have a brand new SAP Code Talk. I had the pleasure of sitting down with SAP mentor Matt Harding, where we covered so much from his early days in audio engineering to diving deep into RAP, clean core and ABAP best practices. and also why musicians make great developers. Now, he shared how his creative mindset shapes his approach to architecture and development. We spoke a little bit about the evolving of SAP community and how events like CodeTalk and TechEd are keeping developers inspired and connected. And we went into so much more. Now, you can check out this CodeTalk on our SAP Developers YouTube channel, and the link to this episode will be in the description below. You don't want to miss it.  

[Witalij] As we reach the midpoint of 2025, the second release of SAP HANA Cloud for the year is now available. Here is a quick look at the key innovations relevant for developers and data scientists among you. In SAP HANA Cloud Central, the main administrative tool, the SQL console has been enhanced to improve usability and functionality. The messages and history tabs have been merged into a single, customizable tab.There is now also an option to automatically format SQL for SAP HANA database connections, helping streamlining the developer experience. This release also brings several important enhancements in the area of embedded machine learning and AI. First, expanded support for tabular AI functions, including vector data analysis with AutoML. Second, a new text embedding module version is now available supporting more languages and optimized for short text scenarios. Newly supported languages include Japanese, Italian, or Chinese. Additionally, the default token length has been increased to 512. And third, capabilities for experiment tracking and task scheduling have also been introduced. For more details, including the Jupyter notebook that demonstrates these features, see the blog post by product manager Christoph Morgan. Following the initial release of the Knowledge Graph engine in Q1, we are now expanding its functionality. The new validate query form allows users to validate RDF data against constraints defined using the shapes, containing language, or shackle. As always, we continue to invest in graphical view modeling in SAP HANA Cloud. This release introduces new features you can explore in the blog post by product manager Jan Zauke. Examples of these features are available in the GitHub repository as well. For a visual summary of the release highlights, check out a short video featuring product manager Thomas Hammer. Links are in the description.  

[DJ] the inner source summit 2025 is on the 13th of November this year it's a special 10th anniversary affair which will be held simultaneously in three locations spanning three global time zones in New York, Berlin and Yokohama if you want to participate specifically give a presentation then note that the call for presenters is open and closes on the 15th of July. All the presentations are to be around 20 minutes and given live. What are you waiting for? Head over to the CFP form and submit your proposal for a chance to speak at this great event.  

[Rich & Thomas] Hey folks, Rich Heilman and Thomas Jung here. Yeah, we're in the SAP Palo Alto offices this week, as part of our US AI CodeJam Roadshow. We were in New York on Monday. We're here in California on Wednesday. And Friday, I'll be in Houston, Texas with our coworker, Mamikee. And we're covering the AI Code Jam. That's right. That's not the only thing we've got going on. What other do we have coming up? We have more roadshows coming up, right? We have roadshows in India, in Southeast Asia. And then we have our Latin America Roadshow, which I will be a part of, as well as Antonio and Josh and me, Mr. Jung. Well, I'm only coming to Mexico, and then you guys are hitting all the other locations. Too many to remember this thing today. But as always, you can check the description below for all the links if any of those events sound interesting to you. So we'll see everybody on the road, won't we? See you there. All right.

entry.title: Re: Candidate and Manager need to sign Offer Letter (with...
entry.content:
Unfortunately, this is not feasible without DocuSign. Instead, you can use the offer approval functionality to get approval from the manager, and then proceed to extend the offer letter.

Thanks,

Sanjeet

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch in Mannheim (2 of 2) Drinks only - Let's chat Joule and all things SAP...
entry.content:
It's time to meetup (again) in Mannheim!!!  While our SAP developer event is internal only, we are going to gather together with a relaxed Tuesday evening get-together for drinks and all are welcome! 🎊

📆When?
🕔After day 1 of of the internal event in Mannheim concludes before the second day - starting from 17:15 (7:15pm) on Tuesday, July 1st (calendar invite is not in 15 minute increments but reservation is for 7:15pm CET

📍Where?

Taproom Jungbusch


🌤️ What to expect:
- A wonderful place for drinks (no food offered at location so eat earlier 😉
- chance to network and connect for those attending our internal event and anyone else in the SAP ecosystem looking to drop in and say hi
- a wonderful local taproom🍺 (pay your own way)

🎟️ Who’s invited?
Everyone! Whether you’re an SAP employee attending the internal event or an SAP enthusiast - come hang out! 💬👋

Please hit the YES button so we know how many to expect.  See you soon!!!

entry.title: newcomer student
entry.content: I am a Master’s student in Logistics Management at the National School of Commerce and Management (ENCG) in Casablanca, Morocco. I am passionate about supply chain optimization and digital transformation, and I am actively preparing to pursue a career in SAP SCM consulting.

entry.title: Re: Screen Invisible
entry.content:
screen-active = 0 

screen-invisible = 1

It works!

entry.title: Re: Ready to hire status automatically closing job req
entry.content:
In Provisioning, under "Edit Applicant Status," the status category needs to be updated. Currently, it appears to be configured as "Onboard" or "Hired," which is causing the requisition to close automatically when a candidate is moved to the "Ready to Hire" stage. You can change the status category to "Miscellaneous" to prevent the requisition from closing at that stage.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: Project System work in progress accrued income
entry.content:
Are you using Resource Related Billing? You can't use 14 or 15 without it.

Are you entering SAP Budget?  That is not the same thing as Plan Cost, they are 2 separate sets of values.  SAP Budget is a spending limit and not associated with a Cost Element.  Plan Cost is entered on a Cost Element.  

To analyze your configuration I suggest you contract with an experienced PS consultant who know RA.

entry.title: Re: What is the best practice when adding a candidate in...
entry.content:
Ideally, when a candidate is manually added to the database, the first notification they receive will include the password reset link. You can check in Recruiting Email Triggers whether the "Manual Candidate Creation Notification" is enabled. If this is triggered in advance, the candidate will already have a password by the time they receive the "Invite to Apply" email, allowing them to log in to the career site.

Thanks,

Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: Referral Process – Enabling Email Notification to Ref...
entry.content:
Hi Margherita,

Please check the applicant status configuration. For each status, there is an option to configure an email for the referee. Once the candidate is moved to that stage, an email will be automatically triggered to the referee.

Thanks,

Sanjeet

entry.title: S4/HANA Cloud - How to block Customers and Supplier from posting.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm working on a project in S4/HANA Cloud Public Edition and I need to block suppliers and customers from posting. I found a Business Object that maintains Business Partners, but it doesn't have a 'Posting Block' option. The closest solution I've found is an ODATA V2 API that has this option within its structure. I would prefer doing this with a Business Object; do you know if there is one that can do the job?


Business Object doc link: https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_BUSINESSPARTNERTP_3

ODATA V2 API doc link: https://api.sap.com/api/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/overview


Kind Regards,
Marcelo Romeiro

entry.title: Re: What is the best practice when adding a candidate in...
entry.content: Hello Sanjeet - thank you very much for the feedback. Appreciate it! I do believe we need to turn this on and it should help in this scenario. Thank you again. Corey

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ Quote 2.0 Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud...
entry.content:

You have two options:

* replication from S4hana

Best regards, Łukasz

entry.title: Creating a Supplier Hierarchy ?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We implementing MDG on S/4 HANA, where we need to create Hierarchies for Supplier master data. As per my little understanding, I think first we need to create the hierarchies in MDG and then the task of assigning suppliers or business partners to the hierarchies will come. Should we be creating those hierarchies at BP level or supplier level. 

Can any one of you tell me or guide me as to how we should create this hierarchy for supplier. I can see a lot of CR Types available from standard.

1) which CR types to use from the following. My assumption says either BPHP1  or BPHP2 to be used. I could be wrong too.

                    BP1P2                  Create Bus. Partner w. Hry. Assignment

                    BPHP1                  Process Business Partner Hierarchies 

                    BPHP2                  Process Business Partner Hierarchies

                    SUPPL1P2           Create Supplier w. Hierarchy Assignment

2) Since we are doing this in MDG on S/4 HANA, should we create hierarchies at BP level or supplier level?  

Thanks, T

entry.title: Re: Update sales order item route on save
entry.content:
Hi PraveenDasari,

please try make change in USEREXIT_MOVE_FIELD_TO_VBKD of userexit MV45AFZZ -> modify XVBAP data. 

Best regards, Łukasz

entry.title: Re: Debugging hints for DRC eInvoice - Mexico CFDI example

entry.title: Re: "Error while parsing an XML stream" while trying to create customer for Business partn
entry.content:
I even used to pass it all together like we do in Odata Gateway payload. But got the same error.

BP Role, Customer creation script using SET_KEY :

SET_KEY(SET_KEY(SET_KEY(data.A_BusinessPartner1,"to_BusinessPartnerAddress", [ {BusinessPartner: params.BPID, AddressID: params.AddressID, HouseNumber: data.A_BusinessPartnerAddress1.HouseNumber, StreetName: data.A_BusinessPartnerAddress1.StreetName, CityName: data.A_BusinessPartnerAddress1.CityName, Country: data.A_BusinessPartnerAddress1.Country, PostalCode: data.A_BusinessPartnerAddress1.PostalCode} ] ), "to_BusinessPartnerRole", [ {BusinessPartnerRole: "FLCU00"}, {BusinessPartnerRole: "FLCU01"} ]), “to_Customer”,  SET_KEY( {Customer: "", CustomerAccountGroup: "ZBLD"}, "to_CustomerCompany", [ SET_KEY( {Customer: "", CompanyCode: "US00", CustomerAccountGroup: "ZBLD", ReconciliationAccount: "110000", PaymentTerms: "0001", APARToleranceGroup: "", PaymentBlockingReason: ""} ) ])

entry.title: Assembly of Unplanned (non-BOM) Materials
entry.content:
Introduction

Assembling unplanned (non-BOM) materials is a common requirement for any manufacturing process, which might happen in situations like:

1. Operator Discretion
An operator identifies a defect and replaces a component with a similar but not pre-listed one (e.g., a resistor of equivalent rating but from a different vendor). The new component wasn’t originally in the BOM but was necessary to proceed.
✅Used when reacting to real-time production deviations.

2. Engineering Changes Not Yet Reflected in the BOM
A design or material change has been approved but not yet updated in the system. The shop floor team uses the new component proactively based on verbal or preliminary instructions.
✅Common during rapid prototyping or early production ramp-up.

3. Component Substitution Due to Inventory Shortages
The planned BOM component is out of stock, and a compatible alternative is pulled from inventory to keep the line running and avoid downtime.
✅Practical workaround to maintain productivity in the face of supply chain issues.

4. Assembly Aids or Temporary Materials
Temporary components like protective caps, alignment jigs, or glue used during assembly may not be listed in the BOM but are still consumed.
✅Frequently happens in manual or semi-automated assembly processes.

5. Quality Assurance Additions
QA may require additional test components or sensors temporarily added for inspection or calibration that are not part of the standard BOM.
✅Often seen in high-spec manufacturing environments like aerospace or medical devices.

In this blog, I will show you how this can be done via /assembledComponents API call, using isBomComponentAssembly flag, which is 'true' by default, but can be set to 'false', enabling non-BOM materials assembly.

Implementation

Create and configure a Production Process to call 'Assemble Components' service, /assembledComponents API, and set isBomComponentAssembly flag as 'false', along with all other mandatory input fields. Save and Deploy it!

Of course, you can also perform the call to /assembledComponents API from Postman or any other 3rd party software for learning or testing purposes, from Custom POD Plugins, from Core POD Plugins Extensions or from any 3rd party systems in a real life scenario.

Execution

Run the Production Process with proper input parameters, to execute the API call, which should run successfully.

A successful API call should trigger 'Production Order Component Add' integration message back to ERP:

Which triggers the Goods Issue posting in ERP, consuming material MZ_BR_T1_R1:

Which was initially not planned in the production order Bill of Materials (BOM):

Conclusion

Using isBomComponentAssembly flag in /assembledComponents API, it´s possible to consume unplanned (non-BOM Components) in a discrete manufacturing flow.

Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.
Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Custom Code decommission - Transaction usage
entry.content: Hello All - we are performing the analysis of transaction that are not used in Production and are candidate for decommission, the challenge we are facing the user base confirm on transaction is used bt the cockpit is showing no usage , how and what to use to get right amount of information

entry.title: Re: Handling Bank Charges During Incoming Payments in SAP FS-CD
entry.content:
Hi ru5.

How do you receive the payment and import it to S/4HANA? Are you using standard import functionality in FI (e.g. FF_5, FEB_FILE_HANDLING) and do the transfer to FS-CD afterwards (FPB7)? And how does the payment item in the bank statement looks like, is it one item and the charge is mentioned in the note-to-payee text only? If you import the bank statement first in FI, lease also check Vijaykumar reply here, maybe it's sufficient to do customizing settings. If not,  I consider to analyze tables FEBEP and FEBRE and change the posting lines, please check this note: https://me.sap.com/notes/494777/E

FPB7 should then transfer the correct amount of 100 USD to Payment Lots in FS-CD (amount is taken from FEBEP-KWBR, if I remember well). What you are searching is a sort of reversed functionality like we provide for the return lot (return > payment amount, the delta is considered as charge), but within FS-CD we do not have such a functionality for payment lots (item < OI), which also would not make sense in case customer are partially paying their outstandings.

BR

entry.title: Re: How to add a new field to Business Volume Selection Criteria?
entry.content:
Hello,

I followed the exact same steps. However, I don't see the new field in the dropdown for selection in the business volume in condition contract. What would be the reason? Am I missing any step.

entry.title: Re: How to assign roles to Consolidation steps ?
entry.content: I am still looking for an answer to this post.

entry.title: Business Objects with Microsoft Fabric
entry.content: We are migrating our data warehouse to Microsoft Fabric with a SQL Endpoint.  We can use Crystal Reports to access the Fabric SQL Endpoint to retrieve data successfully.  However, not every user has access to Crystal Reports.  Instead, most end users utilize Business Objects to view Crystal Reports.  In this situation, we have been unable to get a report to run.  The ODBC connection is successful.  We already know the Crystal Report will run successfully.  When we try to view the report through Business Objects, it just circles and there is no error message.  We've tried using individual users Entra credentials and a Service Princiapal.  Both work directly from Crystal Reports, but not through Business Objects.

entry.title: Crystal Report Runtime Unused Formula Performance
entry.content:
We are working with Crystal Report Runtime Engine For .Net Framework (64 bits) 13.0.37.5230.

We are working with our custom application using the Engine, either via ASP.Net Viewer, or a .Net 4.8 application. The issue also reproduces with SAP B1 Client, opening external crystal report file.

We have a report that uses Basic Syntax Formula for generating 2D GS1 Barcodes (or Code 128 Barcodes).

When the report has several copies (11) of the formula, even when unused, the CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine.ReportDocument.Load(filename) function takes a very long time to complete. We are talking about 1 minute for ~11 unused formulas to generate GS1 Barcodes. 

When commenting the code in the unused formulas, the report loads quickly. 

When opening / running the report in the Crystal Report Editor (version 14.3.4.4938), it loads and executes quickly.

Fortunately, for our customer, it was simple to remove any unused formulas to gain the performance back, but I guess there is a major difference in the formula processing between the Runtime engine and the Crystal Editor that may be anormal?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Employee Central Home Page Customisation.
entry.content: Thank you for these details. Is there a notification we can enable for the surveys enabled on the home page?

entry.title: Re: Unable to see some Domains Data in LMS report
entry.content: @Ramya9, this can happen when the Learning Admin has a role (or more) that's set with restrictions, limiting the data that can be seen (UI and reports) (SAP SuccessFactors Learning Security Domain Restrictions | KBA 2355788).

entry.content: Maintenance planner won"t launch

entry.title: Re: Can LMS Notifications be targeted by Custom Fields?
entry.content: @Julien11, with the current configurations, it's not possible. There's a similar open enhancement request that could be reviewed and voted on if desired. Here you can find the current notification triggers, if required: Template ID to Trigger to Receiver Map.

entry.title: Is there something wrong with maintenance planner
entry.content: Is there something wrong with maintenance planner

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content:
@Necronomicon 

The shell copy environment only contains customizing and repository of the source SAP ECC system, but no master nor transactional data. Means that unfortunately this is not possible. 

The official answer would be, that the CVI has to be executed in the source SAP ECC environment upfront, before the conversion. However, some customers/partners do apply individual solutions such as running MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT on the target S/4H system post migration using Lean SDT. Please note, that MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT officially doesn't support the sync option customer/vendor -> business partner on SAP S/4H but only business partner to customer/vendor. However, some partners/customer run it nevertheless that way after careful testing on project level. That would avoid a CVI pre-project but is officially not supported nor recommended by SAP.

entry.title: Re: Cost Center Standard Hierarchy Change from CE2502 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Can the new cost center standard hierarchy only be created automatically with the creation of the first cost center? In a migration, does that mean you must create one cost center manually to be able to create a subnode in the standard hierarchy, and only then can you migrate all cost centers?

@Minyu  - can you help?

entry.title: Re: Connection tab keeps loading and fails "logon.faces"
entry.content: Also, I assume your company has the DRC licenses, correct?

entry.title: BiWhy – OS Monitoring. Cloud Infrastructure Pitfalls.
entry.content:
Disclaimer:


BiWhy was conceived as comprehensive support tool for SAP BusinessObjects (BOBJ) to troubleshoot issues and facilitate administrative tasks, but as about half of its functionality is not directly tied to BOBJ, it can be used to troubleshoot and monitor other products. That makes it a General-Purpose Support Tool, with the goal of including functionality most demanded by support engineers and software administrators.

BiWhy is currently available exclusively through CoE Max Attention Engagements.


Issue:
BOBJ services failed to start after a routine system reboot, despite no configuration changes.

Initial Findings:
Process Monitor and BiWhy identified SPLUNK (an auxiliary OS monitoring tool) as a lead CPU consumer. Disabling SPLUNK, however, had no impact.

Root Cause & Resolution:
A quick review of hardware metrics in BiWhy and comparison witha healthy node, revealed unusually high disk queue lengths and utilization on the affected node.

Disk performance tests confirmed the disk was operating up to 40x slower than normal.
The issue was brought to the Cloud/VM team, who replaced the disk. Services resumed normal operation.
Apparently some hardware change event was triggered by cloud infrastructure software, with no notification to the tenant.

Takeaway:
It’s unclear why enterprise-grade tools like SPLUNK failed to detect the root cause.
Whether due to software limitations, complex configuration, or unintuitive interfaces that hinder effective use by administrators, but this is not the first time a simple solution like BiWhy has identified an issue where enterprise tools have not.
A simple, intuitive, and informative UI is often what enterprise software lacks.

Screenshots:
Disk Queue

Disk Utilization

entry.title: Re: NACHA File Creation using Payment Medium WorkBench for ACH Payments USA
entry.content: Excellent Doc.  I got file generated but RMR segment must end with a segment terminator like \ and my file does not have \, not sure why?  If you could please reply

entry.title: Re: In MD02 - No procurement proposals changed
entry.content:
Hi Vallamuthu,

Did you find a solution to this issue? We're experiencing the same problem and would love to know how you resolved it.

Thanks

entry.title: Standard Message type for the Inbound IDOC 944 for Posting GR against Inbound delivery
entry.content: Hello Team, We have a requirement to perform PGR wrt HU based IBD and Goods movement status should be updated in IBD w.r.t the inbound idoc 944 received from our 3PL (FYI...3PL received the outbound Del info as a part of Outbound idoc from SAP) .We understood that MBGMCR supports only non-HU based IBD and do the GR against PO/STO line items. We looked for DESADV and WMBBXY as well but with no success .We are planning to build a custom solution as a last option. But before that we would like to know if there is any standard SAP message type existing to achieve the above requirement.

entry.title: Re: Can someone provide the contact details of "Digital Library Support Team" I am unable
entry.content: Hi, I'm asking the internal team to fix it. Can you provide the source URL where you see the broken links?

entry.title: I Killed Fiori (And I'd Do It Again)
entry.content:
Or: How TRIZ Taught Me The Best UI Is No UI

 Hey SAP folks! 👋

 

Deep breath.

I have a confession: I killed Fiori. Not in one system — in all of them. Before you grab your pitchforks, hear me out.

I loved Fiori when it launched in 2013. Finally, SAP that didn't look like Windows 95! Responsive design! Tiles! But it's 2025, and we're still... clicking... through... tiles... to... do... everything.

After working with Fiori since 2015, I had an epiphany that would make any TRIZ (innovation theory) person weep with joy:

"The ideal system is one that doesn't exist but its function is performed."

The "This Can't Be The Future" Moment

Picture this: 9 AM Monday. CFO pings you: "Need the latest P&L for company 1000 — compare this quarter to last, right now."

The Fiori Way™:

  • Open Fiori Launchpad (wait for tiles to load)
  • Find "Financial Statement Analysis" app
  • Click tile (wait for app to load)
  • Select company code from dropdown
  • Choose fiscal period and year
  • Apply profit center filters
  • Navigate through multiple screens
  • Export to Excel for actual analysis

Time: ~4 minutes · 23 clicks · 8 screens · Frustration: Daily

 

The 2025 Way:

Me: Show me P&L breakdown for company code 1000, 
    this quarter vs last quarter

Claude: Q4 2024 vs Q3 2024 analysis ready:
        Revenue: +12% ($2.4M → $2.7M)
        EBITDA margin improved 3.2% 
        (cost optimization in logistics)
        Key driver: 18% increase in Product Line A

Time: 8 seconds · Clicks: 0 · Sanity: Preserved

How I Built The Ultimate Weapon

I knew exactly what I wanted to track. After years with Fiori, I understood the game. So I built a Chrome extension that captures:

  • Every click, input, form submission
  • Every OData request triggered by those clicks
  • Complete UI5 context and metadata
  • Atomic action decomposition with parametrization

The pattern was always there:

   User Action → UI Update → OData Call → Backend Logic

The TRIZ insight: Why do we need the first two steps at all?

   OData Call → Backend Logic

   (Whisper: MCP - OData Bridge!)

The Shocking Truth: 80% Pure Waste

My extension analysed hundreds of Fiori sessions across different apps. The results?

Real data from "Manage Detection Methods":

  • Duration: 27.7 seconds
  • Clicks: 10
  • OData requests: 15
  • @uiannotations involved: 23
  • Actual business logic: Update one field

Pattern discovery:

  • UI Layer: 80% overhead (pure translation)
  • Business Logic: 20% actual work
  • Innovation opportunity: Eliminate the 80%

Liberation from @ui Annotation Hell

Remember wrestling with cryptic @ui annotations? Hours spent debugging why fields don't appear, fighting responsive design, calling consultants when layouts break.

When you eliminate the UI, you eliminate the entire annotation ecosystem. Clean CDS views with pure business logic. No more @ui.* black magic.

The Three Pillars That Killed Fiori

  1. Parametrized Automation→ Record once, replay forever with different parameters
  2. Intelligent Test Generation → Describe in English, auto-generate reliable tests
  3. AI-Ready Business Tools → Convert interactions to semantic tools Claude understands

 

The Transformation Results

95% time reduction. 100% complexity elimination.

The "But What About..." Section

"But what about data visualization?" Great question! Complex charts and graphs? Keep those Fiori apps. But for the 80% of interactions that are just CRUD operations? Dead.

"But what about user permissions?" The OData services already handle that. If you can't do something in Fiori, the AI can't do it either. Security preserved, clicking eliminated.

"But what about complex workflows?" You mean like "Create PO → Route for approval → Update inventory"? Watch this:

"But what about mobile?" You know what works great on mobile? Chat. You know what doesn't? Trying to click tiny Fiori tiles on a phone screen.

What This Means For You

  • For Functional Consultants: Demonstrate a process once, get automation forever. No coding required.
  • For Developers: Focus on business logic. Let AI handle the interaction layer.
  • For Managers: Measure ROI in seconds saved × transactions per day. The math is beautiful.
  • For Everyone: The future isn't better UIs — it's no UIs at all.

Your Turn

Ready to kill your own Fiori apps? The extension turns any SAP professional into an automation architect.

What's your most time-wasting Fiori workflow? Comment below with your biggest pain point — I'll analyse the potential time savings and show you the elimination path.

The ideal interface is one that doesn't exist but gets the job done.

Time to evolve beyond clicking. 🚀

Technical deep-dive and extension demo ➜ [Coming Soon] Next week: "How TRIZ Principle 13 Made SAP Read My Mind"

Quick Reference/Glossary: see in comments.

Let me know in comments what you want me to eliminate next 😃

entry.title: can i write custom entity with Governance API?
entry.content: i want to write values in custom Entity when data comes from SOA Inbound for Supplier at Company code level.is it possible to write custom entity using Governance API ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion - Learning Center categories
entry.content:
Hi Andrew,

Sorry, I don't think that there is any way to modify these values.  One of the values 'Tutorial Package' is used to define the content that appears on the initial screen of the SAP Companion Learning Center, when a user first opens the Learning Center.  I don't think that any of the other values do anything.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Newly created materials not included in MICN for cycle count
entry.content: Our Business has acquired a new company for which we are bringing all inventory loads of the new company into SAP system. New stock materials are created and we performed the stock uploads with movement type 561. The last round of stock material creation was on June 01 and stock upload for testing was done on June 05. We would like to setup cycle count job for this new plant. CC indicator ABCD is also maintained in Material master. Now when I try to run MICN txn to create CC document I get a message "No materials found for physical inventory". When I change the planned count date beyond 4months period in MICN then the material is getting picked for CC. How to handle this issue? We will be creating materials and loading inventory in Production by mid of September and would like to get the CC job scheduled starting Oct 15. Also October 1 will be the start of our new Fiscal Year. If that is the case we will again have same CC issue in Prod as well or system will consider new FY and include materials for counting in October month?  How to overcome this issue?

entry.title: Re: Change Output determination in settlement document
entry.content:
Hi @ErickAnaya, 

To deactivate SAP S/4HANA Output management hence activate NACE/NAST, you should go to the following path and should set the relevant Object type with the Status '2 Application Inactive': 
SPRO > Cross-Application Components > Output Control > Manage Application Object Type Activation


Application object Type for SAP CCM will generally be "SETTLEMENT_DOCUMENT" but for Settlement Management you have many such as: CUSTOMER_SETTLEMENT, CUSTOMER_SETTLEMENT_LIST, SETTLEMENT_DOCUMENT_LIST, SUPPLIER_SETTLEMENT_LIST....

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: Revenue Recognition
entry.content: Check GET PARAMETER ID 'RR_USER' field rr_act statement in program L080OF0F. Solution is to assig parameter ID 'RR_USER' with value 'A' to functional team member who is working SD RAR implementation. Hope this helps!

I am calling an abstract entity on click of a custom action using the following in BDEF of my business object.

action ( features : instance ) custom_button parameter Z_ABSTRACT_ENTITY.

I would like to know if I can hide/show other fields based on the value input in the first field on the abstract entity.

thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @nageshcaparthy @Samir_Rai 
Getting this Error when running the Booster and getting to Set Up Integrations:


Prerequisites for formation type "Integration with Joule" not fulfilled. There are no registered systems of type "SAP Cloud Identity Services". Register at least one system of type "SAP Cloud Identity Services" in your global account.

I do have IAS on my Subaccount and added it manually to the BTP System Landscape.
Any ideas why?

Thanks
Ger

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Date Variant SE16N
entry.content: SE16N (sadly) doesn't offer the "Variant Attributes" function that you will find when saving a selection variant for most transactions - including ye olde SE16! So we're stuck with using SE16 if we need to create Data Browser selection variants with dynamic variables, most commonly dates. A poor oversight by SAP IMHO. And a feature that should be fairly easily implemented given the appropriate motivation - anyone up for a class action? (relax SAP, just kidding - but it would be valued by a large group of users... please?)

entry.title: Re: Create Root-Child-Grandchild-Great Grandchild relationship using RAP
entry.content: Nice job. Many thanks. Could you please share the full code of metadata extension and behavior implementation class？

entry.title: Re: SAP Dynamic Forms 2411 Released Features
entry.content:
Hi @WilliamChou  I am trying to demo Dynamic Forms to a client using the trial version. I am using my BTP trial account connected to S/4 Hana system via the cloud connector. I have SSAM mobile app created and working fine. I see the data(equipment, work order etc.) flowing to my mobile app. I also created a test dynamic form and published it.  But I am lost on how to link dynamic forms to the mobile services on BTP. I have done config on Syclo side.  Do I have to create a RFC connection to my dynamic forms trial account or can I connect it via the cloud connector?  I am looking for steps needed to link my asset manager mobile app to dynamic forms on BTP side.

Thank you,

Sam

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Session | APAC | English
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Have you recently requested provisioning of SAP Cloud ALM? We are thrilled to welcome you aboard! Your journey with #SAP Cloud ALM is about to begin, and we’re here to ensure it is smooth and efficient.

To assist you in this journey, we would like to invite you to one of the below online webinars where we’ll guide you through the setup process and answer any questions you may have.

What to Expect in the Webinar

The SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Webinar has been designed to ensure that you and your team are set up for success. During the session, we will:

  • Demonstrate the initial login procedures to access your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  • Provide guidance on the next steps to use the solution effectively.
  • Highlight essential training resources to support you and your team’s learning journey.
  • Answer any questions you may have during the session.

Your Next Steps

To make the most of your SAP Cloud ALM onboarding experience, here’s what you need to do:

  1. Share this information with your key stakeholders.

    • Ensure that IT Admins, Project Leads, and Implementation or Operations Partners responsible for SAP Cloud ALM are informed.
    • Don’t forget to forward the webinar invitation to your project implementation partner for their participation.

  2. Register for the Webinar.
    Register Now

We’re excited to embark on this journey with you! Let’s make the most of SAP Cloud ALM together. See you at the webinar!

entry.title: Step by step process for creating a Workflow with email notifications for WCM PTW approvals
entry.content:
Hello,

Can someone please share the step by step process for creating a Workflow with email notifications as per the Permits defined under Approvals -> Standard -> Maintain Approvals for WCM.

What we need is email notification to be sent to the relevant department at each status change event of the WCMAPP object.

E.g. on Created event the first approval department gets a notification and on approval from the first department the second approval department gets a notification, on Rejected/Closed the initiator gets a notification and so on.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to generate a SAML assertion by Using SAP Cloud I...
entry.content:
Hi @anna_xu2 , not sure if you found the answer to this, you can use the method as described in OSS note 3429585 - How to generate SAML assertion for SuccessFactors using IAS - SAP for Me which can help with the steps in IAS. You can skip the steps within SuccessFactors as mentioned in this note. Hope this helps.

Thanks,

Aditya

entry.title: Solved - How to join QUT1 and QUT10 tables?
entry.content:
Hoje eu e um amigo conseguimos finalmente resolver o caso da querie entre as tabelas QUT10 e a QUT1. No passado a conexão entre elas deveria ser o LineNum, nas novas versões do SAP o AftLineNum da QUT10 passou a indicar o VisOrder da QUT1 e não o próprio LineNum , no futuro até deveriam renomea-lá para AftVisOrder.

Today, a friend and I finally managed to solve the query issue between the QUT10 and QUT1 tables. In the past, the connection between them was supposed to be LineNum. However, in newer SAP versions, the AftLineNum in QUT10 started pointing to the VisOrder of QUT1, and not LineNum itself. In the future, they should even consider renaming it to AftVisOrder.

SQL Code

SELECT
T1."DocEntry",
'Item' AS "LineType",
T1."VisOrder",
T1."ItemCode",
T1."Dscription",
T1."Quantity",
T1."Price"
FROM QUT1 T1
WHERE T1."DocEntry" = 652
    
UNION ALL

SELECT
T2."DocEntry",
'Text' AS "LineType", 
-- Apesar de ter Line no nome, na realidade ele é a conexão com o campo "VisOrder" da tabela QUT1. Este campo deveria ter o nome de "AftVisOrder"
-- Despite having "Line" in its name, it actually serves as the connection to the "VisOrder" field in the QUT1 table. This field should really be named "AftVisOrder"
CASE WHEN T2."AftLineNum" = -1 THEN -1 ELSE T2."AftLineNum" + 0.5 END AS "VisOrder",
NULL AS "ItemCode",
T2."LineText" AS "Dscription",
NULL AS "Quantity",
NULL AS "Price"
FROM QUT10 T2
WHERE T2."DocEntry" = 652

ORDER BY "VisOrder"

Visual SAP

Querie Result

Rgs

Fabio

SAP 10 FP2505 (PL19) / SQL2022

entry.title: Re: Linking OQUT to QUT1 and QUT10 in Crystal Report 2008
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/solved-how-to-join-qut1-and-qut10-tables/ba-p/14138323#M174107

entry.title: Re: How to join QUT1 and QUT10 tables?

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Replication Model for SAP_COM_0009
entry.content: Hello Enda, Thank you for the detailed explanation. It’s helpful to know that the replication apps are tied to the business catalog SAP_CA_BC_DATA_REP_PC, and that the visibility of this catalog depends on the activation of the scope item 1RO – Master Data Integration. I’ll check the scope item activation status via the Process Navigator link you provided and refer to the instructions for setting up SAP_COM_0009 once activated. I’ll also review the KBA 3122430 for the scope item activation procedure. Thank you again for your clear guidance! Best regards, Kai Suzuki

entry.title: C_S4CFI_2504 Schedule Exam is grayed out even though I have completed the course outline
entry.content:
This is about a recent issue I encountered on SAP Learning Hub related to the C_S4CFI_2504 certification exam.

Previously, the exam could be scheduled without any prerequisites. However, within the past month, a new requirement was introduced mandating the completion of a practical test before scheduling the exam. While I understand and support the importance of ensuring expertise, the sudden implementation of this requirement came without prior notification.

Despite this, I completed the necessary practical test. However, the system seems to have reset my progress, and the “Schedule Exam” button is now greyed out. When I attempt to retake the practical test, I receive a message stating that the content has been updated and the page needs to be refreshed. Unfortunately, refreshing the page does not resolve the issue, and the test does not complete—even though I had successfully completed it before.

Has someone experienced the same? If yes, what did you do? It's frustrating as to before I have already completed it and now the system is glitching.
SAP Learning Hub  SAP S/4HANA Finance Certification

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALMを申請したお客様向けウェルカムセッションのご案内 (日本語開催)
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALMを申請したお客様向けウェルカムセッションのご案内 (日本語開催)

このセッションでは、SAP Cloud ALMのコンセプトや機能概要と合わせ、SAP Cloud ALM プロビジョニング後に必要となるSAP Cloud ALMの初回アクセス方法や必要となる初期設定方法についても説明いたします。
SAP Cloud ALMの概要をまず押さえたい方やSAP Cloud ALMのプロビジョニングが完了したものの、その後の利用準備に至っていない方など、SAP Cloud ALMの活用に向けてスタートしたいお客様、パートナー様にとって最適なセッションです。

 

アジェンダ：

·         SAP Cloud ALMへの初回アクセス方法

·         ユーザの追加と初期設定の方法

·         機能概要のご紹介

·         役立つ資料やサイトのご案内

·         Q&A

Register Now

entry.title: Re: Issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE
entry.content:
@ramchandra_30 

You were asking in a discussion which is almost 25 years old and nobody would respond to you.  Whatever issue you have, please create a new discussion, explaining what the issue is, what analysis you made to find out the root cause with the related screen shots, so that members will assist you

entry.title: Re: How to upload data to date "unassigned" in SAC?
entry.content:
Hi there,

I just wanted to check if this is still unsupported? We are currently finalising a data model that requires an upload to an unassigned Plan Year and would love to know if this capability is in system yet (as I can't seem to find anything).

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Dear Suzanne,

We are actively working towards becoming a Sell Partner for both GROW and RISE with SAP, and I would appreciate your guidance on a couple of points related to the solution consultant certification requirements.

  1. Stay Current Eligibility:
    Some of our consultants who were previously certified have unfortunately lost their Stay Current status as of March 2025. This occurred due to the lack of Learning Hub (Partner Edition) access, as their original certifications were completed under a different organisation. Is there any pathway for us to re-establish Stay Current compliance for these consultants so they may be counted toward the workforce requirement?

  2. Meeting Minimum Certification Criteria:
    To meet the "Global minimum requirements for net-new Sell partner applications," we are progressing the following certification path:

    • Two consultants are pursuing: SAP Certified Associate – Implementation Consultant – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sales (C_S4CS_2502)

    • One consultant is pursuing: SAP Certified Associate – Implementation Consultant – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Financial Accounting (C_S4CFI_2504)

Could you please confirm if this combination satisfies the requirement for at least three SAP-certified cloud solution consultants as part of the application?

Thank you in advance for your guidance and support.

Warm regards,
Karthik Kalaimani
Director | TechSuite Systems

entry.title: Re: S4HANA LTMC
entry.content:
Dear Saurav

The issue occurs because the data was incorrectly filled in the XML template. There are entries present with non-unique keys.
Please make sure to  correct the data in the template by removing/correcting the duplicate keys to avoid the error messages.
Kindly check the below KBA for further details.
2739484 - Migration Cockpit: XXX contains records with duplicate keys 

Best regards,
Latha

entry.title: Re: Understanding ABAP Pipeline Engine used for Data Integration in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"

  • Trigger creation : Whenever any table or CDS view is kept for replication, it creates Insert, Update and Delete triggers on the top of the table (or table which is defined in cdc mapping of  CDS view). Respective triggers are invoked in case of any insert, update or delete operations on the table.
  • Master Logging table: The master logging table is the single source of truth for this job to catch the triggers, i.e  its the first table which gets filled in once any of the triggers are triggered because of a CRUD operation.     "

 

Thanks for your selfless sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Tips and Tricks – Time Valuations with next day combinations (working or non working day filters
entry.content:
@NeeleshKamath Thanks for the informative blog.

With this functionality, we can only query if the next day is working or non-working day.

In case of a working day, it would have been great if we were able to query the start and end time of the next day's planned working time.    

Regards
Sanket

entry.title: How to get Datasphere's objects and data loads metadata - last changes
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can someone provide inputs on the tables where we get the below information in SAP Datasphere:

a) Datasphere objects (Graphical views, Tables, Analytic models) - Last changed on, Last Changed by

b) Datasphere Data loads (batch/real time/data replication) - wanted to know when the loads are updated in Datasphere for any given table.

Thanks!

--

KRPK

entry.title: Re: How To .. Configure Inbound AS2 with Dynamic Encryption and Signature Verification using Partner
entry.content: Hi Philippeaddor, using Mendelson will defeat the purpose of having dynamic encryption and signature verification. I even contacted Mendelson support, but the tool didn't support Client Certificate Authentication. Best regards, 🖖🏻

entry.title: Re: Employee created via Data Migration Cockpit could not...
entry.content:
Hi,

Relationships for object types BP (business partner) and CP (central person) are not supported by Migration Cockpit object "HCM - Relationship" as per SAP Help Portal HCM - Relationship.

Execute the report /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE for all migrated employees to generate relationships for object types BP (business partner) and CP (central person).

You can run upto 500 employees in the report /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE each time.

Kindly refer to the below KBA for more details.
3624751 - SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit: Relationships for object type BP (business partner) and CP (central person) is not generated

entry.title: Re: Issue with deployment of SAP UI5 application from BAS...
entry.content: Hi junwu,

entry.title: Re: S4HANA LTMC
entry.content: Hi Saurav
